items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Exploit for CVE-2026-15409 exploit
id: 396e5038-6e24-519b-ba73-833857726843
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-15409 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-15409
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-15409 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T10:12:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-15409", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-15409 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4264619; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Intelligence confirmed: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; CVSS score 10.0 (Critical); CVE(s) referenced: CVE-2026-15409

confidence_factors.signal: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities
CVE corroborated by 2 distinct sources: rss_securityweek_com_feed_, rss_sploitus_com_rss

items.title: SonicWall Issues Urgent SMA Patch Warning for Two Zero-Day Exploits
items.description:
SonicWall SMA1000 zero-day vulnerabilities CVE-2026-15409 and CVE-2026-15410 can be exploited for remote code execution. 
 The post SonicWall Issues Urgent SMA Patch Warning for Two Zero-Day Exploits appeared first on SecurityWeek .
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] THREAT-INTEL advisory. Risk score 8.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] Exploit - critical severity (Risk 9.0/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1190 (1 technique). 2 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-CVE-GEN. AI confidence: LOW (25%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

ioc_paywall.message: 2 IOC(s) at 14.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.title: Microsoft Active Directory Services 0-Day Vulnerability Actively Exploited in the Wild
items.description:
Microsoft has released security updates for CVE-2026-56155, an actively exploited elevation-of-privilege vulnerability in Active Directory Federation Services (AD FS). This flaw allows an authenticated local attacker with low privileges to gain administrator-level access on affected systems. CVE-2026-56155 stems from insufficient granularity in access control within AD FS, a Microsoft service commonly utilized by organizations for [] 
 The post Microsoft Active Directory Services 0-Day V

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57702 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Comman
id: 1c2e2f6f-b984-5e8b-8076-458785ca355a
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-57702 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: SQLI
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57702
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57702 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T10:12:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57702", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-57702 Exploitation Attempt - SQLI"; flow:established,to_server; content:"UNION SELECT"; nocase; content:"--"; distance:0; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2784934; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.3 (Critical); Source 'nvd_cve' is authoritative (government/standards body)
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours

// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57698 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T10:12:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57698", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57424 Missing Authorization vulnerability in knitpay Razorpay Payment L
id: f0761e61-01b5-5375-b575-33e7a2b24912
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-57424 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57424
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57424 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T10:12:35Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-57424", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-57424 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6186702; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
